g.text: A computer can double-check only 7% of the objections on its own today

text.style: fill: #444444; font: 9.6px 'TeX Gyre Pagella', 'Palatino', 'DejaVu Serif', serif; text-anchor: start

g.text: All 236 seeded-defect concerns, by how their grounding can be checked. The ceiling is a data-loss artifact — the per-case briefings

text.style: fill: #444444; font: 9.6px 'TeX Gyre Pagella', 'Palatino', 'DejaVu Serif', serif; text-anchor: start

g.text: weren't persisted — not a tooling gap (the in-briefing resolver exists). §8 / §10.2.

text.style: fill: #8a2f2f; font: italic 8.5px 'TeX Gyre Pagella', 'Palatino', 'DejaVu Serif', serif; text-anchor: start

g.text: Exact (frozen): machine-verified 17 and ungrounded 40 are counted directly; the in-briefing split (≈19% / ≈57%) is the §10.2 hand-map.

text.style: fill: #8a2f2f; font: italic 8.5px 'TeX Gyre Pagella', 'Palatino', 'DejaVu Serif', serif; text-anchor: start
